title: Jack Osbourne Honors Late Father with Baby Name and Festival Plans
summary: Jack Osbourne and his wife Aree have welcomed a daughter, naming her Ozzy in tribute to Jack's father, Ozzy Osbourne, who passed away eight months ago at age 76. The announcement included a photo of the newborn with a bat toy, referencing a famous incident from Ozzy Sr.'s rock career. Jack, who has other children including three-year-old Maple with Aree and three daughters from a previous marriage, revealed the pregnancy after exiting the I'm A Celebrity show in December, describing it as a healing distraction. Recently, Ozzy Sr. was honored at the Brit Awards with a performance by Robbie Williams, a family friend. Additionally, Jack and his mother Sharon announced on their podcast that Ozzfest, a heavy metal and hard rock festival founded by Ozzy Sr., will return in 2027 after last being held in 2018. Plans include hosting events at Aston Villa's Villa Park Stadium in the UK and expanding to the US, as Sharon emphasized the importance of staying active. This article highlights personal family milestones and efforts to continue Ozzy Sr.'s musical legacy through public events.

background_read: The Osbourne family is a prominent figure in the entertainment industry, known for their involvement in rock music and reality TV. Ozzy Osbourne, the late father, was a legendary heavy metal singer with Black Sabbath and had a solo career, famous for his wild antics, including a bat incident. Jack Osbourne, his son, has appeared on shows like I'm A Celebrity and runs a podcast with his mother Sharon. Ozzfest, launched in 1996, is a major festival that helped popularize heavy metal bands. The Brit Awards are a key event in the UK music scene. This article connects personal family events with broader cultural contributions, showing how the Osbournes continue to influence music and media.
Article_Structure: This article covers the birth of Jack Osbourne's daughter, named Ozzy after his late father, highlighting it as a tribute. Main points include the baby announcement with symbolic bat toy, Jack's family details, and plans to revive Ozzfest in 2027. The purpose is to report on personal milestones and legacy preservation in the Osbourne family. Evidence comes from social media posts and podcast announcements, making it credible but informal. Author credibility is assumed as BBC Entertainment, a reputable source, though specific expertise isn't detailed. Methodology involves summarizing public statements and events, with a focus on entertainment news.

perspectives.description: The baby name and festival revival show efforts to keep Ozzy Sr.'s memory alive in music and family
